recommendations.title: Tesla
recommendations.overview: The story of the Promethean struggles of Nikola Tesla, as he attempts to transcend entrenched technology—including his own previous work—by pioneering a system of wireless energy that would change the world.

recommendations.title: Marjorie Prime
recommendations.overview: A service which creates holographic projections of late family members allows an elderly woman to spend time with a younger version of her deceased husband.

recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Modern day adaptation of Shakespeare's immortal story about Hamlet's plight to avenge his father's murder in New York City.

recommendations.title: Waist Deep
recommendations.overview: An ex-convict gets tangled up with a gang after his car is hijacked with his son inside.

recommendations.title: Gridlock'd
recommendations.overview: After a friend overdoses, Spoon and Stretch decide to kick their drug habits and attempt to enroll in a government detox program. Their efforts are hampered by seemingly endless red tape, as they are shuffled from one office to another while being ch

recommendations.title: Glitter
recommendations.overview: A young woman is catapulted into pop stardom, with her already-famous DJ boyfriend calling the shots.

recommendations.title: The Great Dictator
recommendations.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

recommendations.title: Experimenter
recommendations.overview: Yale University, 1961. Stanley Milgram designs a psychology experiment that still resonates to this day, in which people think they’re delivering painful electric shocks to an affable stranger strapped into a chair in another room. Despite his pleads

recommendations.title: Magnum Force
recommendations.overview: "Dirty" Harry Callahan is a San Francisco Police Inspector on the trail of a group of rogue cops who have taken justice into their own hands. When shady characters are murdered one after another in grisly fashion, only Dirty Harry can stop them.

recommendations.title: Black Rain
